seedClassifications.migrationTarget: permanent runtime package or consolidation source
production module, evaluation asset, failure fixture, or legacy

targetSubsystems.notes: Permanent contract, identity, safety, lifecycle, and terminal-state authority. Current package placement is provisional until upward dependencies are removed.
Local attempt, task, approval, and execution coordination. Must replace phase-numbered orchestration as production authority.

limitations: does not classify architecture or legacy status
does not infer callers or semantic dependency graphs
Git metadata is optional and local-only
test ownership is heuristic and must include confidence and evidence
targetSubsystems.nextGate: Repository Snapshot v1 certification and actual-repository proof
targetSubsystems.notes: Deterministic bounded inventory of repository source, runtime data, generated artifacts, and legacy surfaces. Must precede Repository Truth. Mark as certified only after the full validation and certification suite passes.
Classifies snapshot evidence into active modules, evaluation assets, failure fixtures, legacy references, and obsolete assets without relying on heuristic certainty.
SQLite-backed local operational state. Existing JSON/JSONL stores are useful evidence but should converge behind one Runtime-owned state boundary.
Unified deterministic and rubric-based evaluation. Existing certs, phase verifiers, and tests require classification before consolidation.
Learning requires baseline, attempted strategy, observed result, diagnosis, candidate improvement, repeat evaluation, promotion decision, and rollback information.
Replaceable local model provider runtime. Ollama is a first real local target, but Kernel must remain model-independent.
Normalizes text, documents, code, images, audio, video, links, and future sensor inputs into evidence records. Provider use must be explicit.
Downloadable local operator surface. Current operator console is provisional because UI and capability logic are mixed.
First reference MVP capability. Must accept a goal, ingest local evidence, identify missing capability, plan, execute in isolation, evaluate, learn, persist state, and run offline.

acceptanceCriteria: legacy browser and overlay transport isolated
